summary: Iteration 22 (Batch 1) testing complete. All features verified successfully: (1) Lotus PWA icons - all 6 icon endpoints return 200, (2) manifest.json updated with android-chrome-192x192.png and android-chrome-512x512.png icons, (3) Mobile email verification banner uses responsive flex-col/flex-row layout, (4) Specialist modal Select dropdown works properly inside Dialog (z-index z-[100] fix confirmed), (5) Password rules visible in registration UI with live validation (8 chars, uppercase, number, special char), (6) Reset password page shows 8-char rules with visible indicators, (7) Homepage greeting changed to 'Vítej' (confirmed), (8) Google Auth buttons: 'Registrovat přes Google' on register tab, 'Přihlásit se přes Google' on login tab, (9) Page transition animation with page-enter CSS class, (10) Login page centered layout with PWA instructions below.

feature_test_results.manifest_json_icons: PASS - manifest.json contains android-chrome-192x192.png and android-chrome-512x512.png entries
feature_test_results.login_page_centered: PASS - Login card centered with PWA install section below
feature_test_results.google_login_button: PASS - Button shows 'Přihlásit se přes Google' in login tab
feature_test_results.google_register_button: PASS - Button shows 'Registrovat přes Google' in register tab
feature_test_results.register_password_rules: PASS - Live password rule indicators visible when typing (8 chars, uppercase, number, special char)
feature_test_results.reset_password_page: PASS - Shows 'Zadejte nové heslo' with 8-char minimum rules visible when typing
feature_test_results.specialist_modal: PASS - Modal opens, form inputs work, Select dropdown opens properly (z-index fix works)
feature_test_results.page_transition_animation: PASS - main element has page-transition class for smooth entrance animation
feature_test_results.mobile_verification_banner: PASS - Banner uses flex-col sm:flex-row for responsive stacking, button w-full sm:w-auto
feature_test_results.backend_password_validation: PASS - /api/auth/reset-password validates 8-char minimum, uppercase, number, special char
feature_test_results.authentication_works: PASS - Login with test1@bloom.cz/test123 returns token and user

critical_code_review_comments: Icons generated with Pillow and placed in /app/frontend/public/icons/ - confirmed all 200 status
Select component z-index changed from z-50 to z-[100] at line 55 in select.jsx - confirmed dropdown works in Dialog modal
Password rules in AuthPage.js lines 313-324 - live indicators with checkmark/circle
Password rules in ResetPasswordPage.js lines 26-31 + 131-139 - same 4 rules with 8-char minimum
Layout.js line 370 verification banner uses flex-col sm:flex-row for mobile responsive layout
App.css lines 170-178 define page-enter animation for smooth page transitions
Google Auth buttons at AuthPage.js lines 226-238 (login) and 412-424 (register)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 22 Batch 1 all features verified. Key implementations: (1) Lotus icons at /app/frontend/public/icons/, (2) Select z-[100] fix for Dialog modals at line 55 select.jsx, (3) Password rules UI with live indicators in AuthPage.js lines 313-324 and ResetPasswordPage.js lines 131-139, (4) 'Vítej' greeting at HomePage.js line 48, (5) Google Auth buttons at AuthPage.js lines 226-238 and 412-424, (6) Page transition animation at App.css lines 170-178, (7) Mobile verification banner responsive layout at Layout.js line 370. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_bloom_iteration22.py
